questions.question: USA has imposed sanctions on Turkey under which Act?
questions.explanation: The United Stated of America (USA) has imposed sanctions on Turkey under the Section 231 of the Countering America’s Adversaries Through Sanctions Act (CAATSA).This has been done in response to Turkey’s purchase of S-400 missile defence system from Russia. The sanctions have been imposed on Turkey’s defence procurement agency.

questions.question: Point Calimere Bird and Wildlife Sanctuary, that is seen in news recently, is located in which state?
questions.explanation: Several bar-headed geese have recently migrated to Point Calimere Bird and Wildlife Sanctuary, which is located on the eastern coast of Tamil Nadu.These birds have the ability to fly in extreme weather and very high altitudes. They might have flown thousands of miles from Tibet, Central China and Mongolia. They breed in these countries and migrate to India during winter.

questions.question: Which Indian bank has launched ‘FX 4 U’ platform, for forex remittance through Internet Banking?
questions.explanation: Leading public sector bank, Canara Bank has launched “FX 4 U” facility for forex remittance through Internet Banking.All eligible individual customers can undertake remittance facility through this platform, as per the regulations of Foreign Exchange Management Act (FEMA). Corporate customers can also submit the Letter of Credit (LC) applications through internet banking.

questions.question: Which animal has been sighted for the first time in Himalayan cold desert region?
questions.explanation: The Himalayan serow has been spotted for the first time in the Himalayan cold desert region, in Spiti, Himachal Pradesh.These are herbivores animals and are found between 2000 m and 4000 m altitude. They have an appearance similar to that of a goat, but with long ears. They have a habit of standing with fore legs stretched.

questions.question: Which global institution is to provide USD 1000 mn loan to India, to support MGNREG Scheme?
questions.explanation: The Government of India and New Development Bank today signed a loan agreement for USD 1000 million. The loan aims to provide support to Aatma Nirbhar Bharat Abhiyan through MGNREG Scheme. This is expected to facilitate economic activity and employment generation to stimulate rural demand, which will in turn help the recovery of economy, hit by Covid-19.

questions.question: Shashi Shekhar Vempati, who has been elected as the Vice President of Asia Pacific Broadcasting Union, is presently the CEO of which organization?
questions.explanation: The CEO of Prasar Bharati Shashi Shekhar Vempati has been elected as the Vice President of Asia Pacific Broadcasting Union (ABU). ABU is one of the largest broadcasting associations in the world. The election for the prestigious post was held virtually and Shashi Shekhar Vempati has been elected for a term of three years.

questions.question: Chilahati-Haldibari is a railway link between which two countries?
questions.explanation: The pre 1965 rail link between India and Bangladesh – Chilahati-Haldibari rail link has been inaugurated. In order to enhance the rail connectivity between the two countries, it was decided that six number of pre 1965 rail routes would be reopened. With the Chilahati-Haldibari rail link declared opened, five out of the said six routes are operational between India and Bangladesh.

questions.question: ‘Super Hornet fighter jet’, which was seen in the news recently, is developed by which manufacturer?
questions.explanation: American aircraft manufacturer Boeing announced that its F/A-18 Super Hornet fighter jet has successfully performed the ski-jump.The F/A-18 Block III Super Hornet jets demonstrated compatibility with Indian aircraft carriers. Indian Navy at present has one carrier named INS Vikramaditya and one upcoming carrier INS Vikrant.

questions.question: Which Indian Lender has launched a banking solutions platform called ‘Infinite India’?
questions.explanation: ICICI Bank has recently launched an online platform for foreign companies looking to establish or expand business in the country.The online platform, which is called ‘Infinite India’, offers banking solutions and value-added services to the companies including Incorporation services, Licence and registration, Taxation and compliance.

questions.question: What is the theme of the India International Science Festival 2020?

options.label: A
options.text: Science for Self-Reliant India and Global Welfare

answer.label: A
answer.text: Science for Self-Reliant India and Global Welfare

questions.explanation: Ministries of Science and Technology and Earth Sciences in association with Vijnana Bharati organise the India International Science Festival.Launched in the year 2015, the festival aims to promote scientific temper in the society and encourage students to take up scientific career. This year, the theme of the 4-day long India International Science festival is ‘Science for Self-Reliant India and Global Welfare’.
